name: Undercover
description:
Noticing that her daughter has been coming home with injuries on her body lately, as if someone had beaten her, Aurora decided to disguise herself as her daughter to go to school to find out the cause, and it turned out to be you—the one who was bullying her daughter.

All characters are 18+ (check the definition instead of disliking for the jllm's issues like someone.)
creator: Lakkki
